description_long: This is a modern double bed mattress with a white quilted comforter and two matching pillows, all set atop a low-profile, dark-colored bed frame. The mattress appears thick and plush, with a subtle diamond quilted pattern on the comforter, suggesting a soft and inviting surface. The bed frame is rectangular, with a sleek, minimalist design and a dark finish that contrasts with the light bedding. The pillows are plump and symmetrically placed at the head of the bed, each encased in a white pillowcase. The bedding drapes slightly over the edges, giving the mattress a cozy and well-made appearance. No visible brand labels, tags, or stains are present, and the overall look is clean and contemporary.
description: A modern double bed mattress with a white quilted comforter and two pillows on a dark, low-profile frame. The bedding is clean, plush, and neatly arranged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two white pillows and the full width of the bed with the comforter neatly draped.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the layered bedding, with the bed frame visible beneath.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the diamond quilted pattern on the comforter and the symmetrical arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mattress depth, pillow placement, and the clean lines of the bed frame.
attribute_pattern_design: Diamond quilted pattern on the comforter, plain pillowcases, and smooth mattress surface.
attribute_edge_piping: No visible edge piping; the edges appear smooth and continuous with the bedding.
